SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM store_sales c LEFT JOIN item p ON c.ss_item_sk = p.i_item_sk WHERE p.i_item_sk IS NULL AND c.ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM store_sales c LEFT JOIN customer p ON c.ss_customer_sk = p.c_customer_sk WHERE p.c_customer_sk IS NULL AND c.ss_customer_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM store_sales c LEFT JOIN date_dim p ON c.ss_sold_date_sk = p.d_date_sk WHERE p.d_date_sk IS NULL AND c.ss_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS orphan_ratio FROM store_sales c WHERE NOT EXISTS (  SELECT 1 FROM item p WHERE p.i_item_sk = c.ss_item_sk)

SELECT COUNT(*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS orphan_ratio FROM store_sales c WHERE NOT EXISTS (  SELECT 1 FROM customer p WHERE p.c_customer_sk = c.ss_customer_sk)
SELECT COUNT(*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS orphan_ratio FROM store_sales c WHERE NOT EXISTS (  SELECT 1 FROM date_dim p WHERE p.d_date_sk = c.ss_sold_date_sk)
SELECT COUNT(r.i_item_sk) / NULLIF(CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT), 0) AS join_coverage_ratio FROM store_sales l LEFT JOIN item r ON l.ss_item_sk = r.i_item_sk
SELECT COUNT(r.c_customer_sk) / NULLIF(CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT), 0) AS join_coverage_ratio FROM store_sales l LEFT JOIN customer r ON l.ss_customer_sk = r.c_customer_sk
SELECT COUNT(r.d_date_sk) / NULLIF(CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT), 0) AS join_coverage_ratio FROM store_sales l LEFT JOIN date_dim r ON l.ss_sold_date_sk = r.d_date_sk
